title: neottia pantlingii
intro: Neottia pantlingii, also known as the orchid-flowered Neottia, is a rare and endangered plant species native to the Himalayas. As an orchid-flowered Neottia, it belongs to the genus Neottia of the family Orchidaceae, a group of flowering plants known for their beautiful and unique flowers. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its tubers which contain bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the tubers are used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health.
